instructions: Use this queue for metadata work not covered by source/image/barcode-specific queues.
Every field/store group still requires exact official or trusted evidence before import.
Barcode, source_url, and image_url remain in their dedicated queues.

batches.recommended_action: Confirm official metadata evidence, then fill field/store patch templates.

groups.evidence_required: official product or campaign page showing release/sale date
